title: Update a Status Box with Just One Click from Your Notification
excerpt:

posts.author: ricky.thomas (Ricky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com’ers-

Could we request a feature where a user can click a button or link in an email notification (similar to the ‘Like’ feature) that asks a specific question related to a column that needs updating? For example, ‘Has this been completed?’ If they click ‘Yes,’ it would automatically update the corresponding status column on the board to ‘Completed’ (or another status tied to ‘Yes’).

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ricky.thomas

EasyMails has a super useful feature for this! You can set up a button in your email that, when clicked, updates a status on your monday.com board directly. So, for example, if you add a “Yes” button, the recipient can click it, and it’ll automatically mark the task as “Completed” or any other status you set.

It’s really convenient and removes the hassle of manual updates – definitely a time-saver! Hope this helps!

posts.author: ricky.thomas (Ricky)
posts.cookedHtml: We sadly are not allowed to add integrations into Monday per our corporate security team rules.
